title: Billing Settings
subtitle: Configure default billing settings for students

paymentDueDays.label: Default Due Date (in days)
paymentDueDays.description: How many days after invoice creation it should be due. Applied to all new invoices.

defaultBillingDay.label: Default Billing Day
defaultBillingDay.description: Day of the month to be suggested when registering new students (1-28). Leave empty for no default.

defaultPaymentMethod.label: Default Payment Method
defaultPaymentMethod.description: Method used for automated invoices. PIX has lower fees than boleto.

messages.updateSuccessDescription: Your billing settings have been saved successfully.

feeComparison.title: Compare fees and save!
feeComparison.description: PIX has much lower fees than boleto
